creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-12-26 18:00:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-Text-Emoticon-MSN Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Text::Emoticon::MSN is a text filter that replaces text emoticons
  like ":-)", ";-P", etc. to the icons of MSN Messenger, detailed
  in http://messenger.msn.com/Resource/Emoticons.aspx
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Text-Emoticon-MSN/
  
  PR:             ports/142027
  Submitted by:   Alex Deiter <Alex.Deiter at Gmail.COM>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1397    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/textproc/p5-Text-Emoticon-MSN/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Text-Emoticon-MSN/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Text-Emoticon-MSN/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Text-Emoticon-MSN/pkg-plist (new)
